tools.name: businessLines.deleteBusinessLinesId
tools.description:
Deletes a business line.

 >If you delete a business line linked to a [payment method](https://docs.adyen.com/development-resources/paymentmethodvariant#management-api), it can affect your merchant account's ability to use the [payment method](https://docs.adyen.com/api-explorer/Management/latest/post/merchants/_merchantId_/paymentMethodSettings). The business line is removed from all linked merchant accounts.

tools.name: businessLines.getBusinessLinesId
tools.description: Returns the detail of a business line.

tools.name: businessLines.postBusinessLines
tools.description:
Creates a business line. 

This resource contains information about your user's line of business, including their industry and their source of funds. Adyen uses this information to verify your users as required by payment industry regulations. Adyen informs you of the verification results through webhooks or API responses.

tools.name: documents.deleteDocumentsId
tools.description: Deletes a document.

tools.name: documents.getDocumentsId
tools.description: Returns a document.

tools.name: documents.patchDocumentsId
tools.description: Updates a document.

tools.name: documents.postDocuments
tools.description:
Uploads a document for verification checks.

 Adyen uses the information from the [legal entity](https://docs.adyen.com/api-explorer/#/legalentity/latest/post/legalEntities) to run automated verification checks. If these checks fail, you will be notified to provide additional documents.

 You should only upload documents when Adyen requests additional information for the legal entity.

tools.name: hostedOnboarding.getThemes
tools.description: Returns a list of hosted onboarding page themes.

tools.name: hostedOnboarding.getThemesId
tools.description: Returns the details of the theme identified in the path.

tools.name: hostedOnboarding.postLegalEntitiesIdOnboardingLinks
tools.description: Returns a link to an Adyen-hosted onboarding page where you need to redirect your user.

tools.name: legalEntities.getLegalEntitiesId
tools.description: Returns a legal entity.

tools.name: legalEntities.getLegalEntitiesIdBusinessLines
tools.description: Returns the business lines owned by a legal entity.

tools.name: legalEntities.patchLegalEntitiesId
tools.description:
Updates a legal entity.

 >To change the legal entity type, include only the new `type` in your request. To update the `entityAssociations` array, you need to replace the entire array. For example, if the array has 3 entries and you want to remove 1 entry, you need to PATCH the resource with the remaining 2 entries.

tools.name: legalEntities.postLegalEntities
tools.description:
Creates a legal entity. 

This resource contains information about the user that will be onboarded in your platform. Adyen uses this information to perform verification checks as required by payment industry regulations. Adyen informs you of the verification results through webhooks or API responses.

tools.name: pciQuestionnaires.getLegalEntitiesIdPciQuestionnaires
tools.description: Get a list of signed PCI questionnaires.

tools.name: pciQuestionnaires.getLegalEntitiesIdPciQuestionnairesPciid
tools.description: Returns the signed PCI questionnaire.

tools.name: pciQuestionnaires.postLegalEntitiesIdPciQuestionnairesGeneratePciTemplates
tools.description: Generates the required PCI questionnaire based on the user's [salesChannel](https://docs.adyen.com/api-explorer/#/legalentity/latest/post/businessLines__reqParam_salesChannels). If multiple questionnaires are required, this request creates a single consodilated document to be signed.

tools.name: pciQuestionnaires.postLegalEntitiesIdPciQuestionnairesSignPciTemplates
tools.description: Signs the required PCI questionnaire.

tools.name: termsOfService.getLegalEntitiesIdTermsOfServiceAcceptanceInfos
tools.description: Returns Terms of Service information for a legal entity.

tools.name: termsOfService.patchLegalEntitiesIdTermsOfServiceTermsofservicedocumentid
tools.description: Accepts Terms of Service.

tools.name: termsOfService.postLegalEntitiesIdTermsOfService
tools.description: Returns the Terms of Service document for a legal entity.

tools.name: transferInstruments.deleteTransferInstrumentsId
tools.description: Deletes a transfer instrument.

tools.name: transferInstruments.getTransferInstrumentsId
tools.description: Returns the details of a transfer instrument.

tools.name: transferInstruments.patchTransferInstrumentsId
tools.description: Updates a transfer instrument.

tools.name: transferInstruments.postTransferInstruments
tools.description:
Creates a transfer instrument. 

A transfer instrument is a bank account that a legal entity owns. Adyen performs verification checks on the transfer instrument as required by payment industry regulations. We inform you of the verification results through webhooks or API responses.

When the transfer instrument passes the verification checks, you can start sending funds from the balance platform to the transfer instrument (such as payouts).

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
